info.title: FaultManager Service
info.description: This is the spec that defines the APIs provided by the  Fault Manager service to raise alerts and alarms

get.description: Get the health of the faultmanager service

401.description: Authorization information is missing or invalid

409.description: The request could not be processed because of conflict with the current state of target resource

get.description: Pre-generated lists of all possible alerts that EFA could raise

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: Health resource path associated to the alert being sent

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: Health resource path associated to the alert being sent

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of alerts to be displayed

parameters.name: before_timestamp
parameters.description: Alerts being sent before a particular time stamp

parameters.name: after_timestamp
parameters.description: Alerts being sent after a particular time stamp

parameters.name: pagination

delete.description: Purges all closed alarms in XCO

409.description: The request could not be processed because of conflict with the current state of target resource

Resource.description: Health resource path associated to the alert being sent

SequenceID.description: Tracks the sequence in which messages are submitted

Resource.description: Health resource path associated to the alert being sent

Message.example: The application server certificate on XCO will expire soon

Resource.description: Health resource path associated to the alarm being sent

WillClear.description: Alarms ability to be cleared by system

Description.example: Notify an application certificate is about to expire or has expired.

RaiseConditions.description: Conditions when the alarm will be raised

ClearConditions.description: Conditions when the alarm will be cleared

Name.description: Name of the raise or close condition

Desc.example: Raise the DeviceCertificateExpiration alarm when a device certificate is about to expire within 90 days.

Salience.description: Raise or clear condition priority. Higher value is higher priority

WhenClause.description: When to raise or clear the alarm

ThenClause.description: Action to be taken when the condition is met

Resource.description: Health resource path associated to the alarm being sent

IsCleared.description: Signifies that the alarms clearing condition has been met and the system has cleared the alarm

Message.description: Alarms latest message update derived from the alert which has caused the alarm to be raised

TimeCreated.description: Time when the alarm first appeared in the system

LastRaised.description: Time when the alarm was raised last

LastChanged.description: Time when the alarm was changed last due to a severity state change or by an operator acknowledging or closing the alarm

IsAcked.description: Alarms that are acked by user

IsClosed.description: Alarms that are closed by user

StatusChangeList.description: A list of the status changes by the system including severity and clearing status changes

UserStateChangeList.description: A list of state changes performed by the user such as acknowledging and closing an alarm

Time.description: Time when the status change occurred

Severity.description: Alarms perceived severity including a cleared severity

Message.description: Alarms latest message update derived from the alert which has caused the alarm status change

Time.description: Time when the state change occurred

User.description: Username who performed the state change operation

UserState.description: User state change such as acknowledged or closed

Comment.description: Optional user comment provided with the acknowledge or close operation
Comment.example: closing this alarm as this is not critical

Severity.description: Severities are from the Alarms last perceived severity

Total.description: Total number of alarms for the given severity

NotCleared.description: Total number of uncleared alarms for the given severity

Cleared.description: Total number of cleared alarms for the given severity

ClearedNotClosed.description: Total number of cleared but not closed alarms for the given severity

ClearedClosed.description: Total number of cleared and closed alarms for the given severity

NotClearedClosed.description: Total number of uncleared and closed alarms for the given severity

NotClearedNotClosed.description: Total number of uncleared and unclosed alarms for the given severity

Message.description: An alarm purge will release all the resources related to the stateful alarm entity.
Message.example: All closed alarms are purged succesfully
